Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for accounts via SSH

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password bruteforcing from host {src.host} for account {subject.account.name} via SSH on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Password bruteforcing attempts from host {src.host} for account {subject.account.name} via SSH on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
